title: (Un)Necessary Anvil Tweaks
description: Because the vanilla anvil interface is... well, necessary but boring. This mod adds unnecessarily cool tweaks to make repairs more interesting!
body:
![#(Un)Necessary Anvil Tweaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7820c3ba0f9c3eab53aabc477fe12f4f2b6aa1f.png)

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.11-green)
![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modloader-Fabric-blue)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow)

Because the vanilla anvil interface is... well, necessary but boring. This mod adds unnecessarily cool tweaks to make repairs more interesting!

## ✨ Features

### 🔧 Text Alignment
- **Left, Center, or Right** alignment options
- Perfect positioning for your preferences
- Removes distracting background boxes

### 🎬 Smooth Animations (5 styles)
- **Slide** - Text slides in from the right
- **Fade** - Text fades in smoothly
- **Slide Up** - Text slides up from bottom
- **Typewriter** - Text appears character by character
- **Slide + Fade** - Combined effect

### ⚙️ Customization
- **Speed Control** - Adjust from 0.1x to 3.0x
- **Shake Effect** - Vibrating text for "Too Expensive" messages
- **Multi-language** - Works with English and Spanish

## 🚀 Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download [(Un)Necessary Anvil Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/(un)necessary-anvil-tweaks/versions)
4. Place the JAR file in your `.minecraft/mods/` folder

## ⚙️ Configuration

Access all settings in-game via **ModMenu**:
1. Open the ModMenu interface
2. Click on "(Un)Necessary Anvil Tweaks"
3. Adjust animations, speed, and effects
4. Changes apply instantly

## 🔧 Technical Details

- **Client-side only** - No server installation needed
- **Requires**:
    - Fabric Loader 0.18.2+
    - Fabric API
- **Optional**: ModMenu for in-game configuration

## 🤝 Compatibility

- Works with most UI/resource pack mods
- Compatible with other anvil-related mods

## 🐛 Reporting Issues

Found a bug or have a suggestion?
[Open an issue](https://github.com/Astralis-B/unnecessary-anvil-tweaks/issues)

Please include:
- Minecraft version
- Mod version
- Other installed mods
- Steps to reproduce the issue

## 🙏 Credits

- **Astralis** - Development
- **FabricMC** - Modloader
- **Cloth Config** - Configuration API
- **ModMenu** - In-game menu integration

*"Because who said repair costs can't be fabulous?"*
